title: Tellima breviloba
taxonomy: Tellima breviloba belongs to the family of Saxifragaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as saxifrage. The genus Tellima is a monotypic genus, containing only one species, Tellima breviloba. Tellima breviloba is a perennial plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It is a member of the order Saxifragales, which includes a variety of flowering plants with similar characteristics. This classification helps identify Tellima breviloba as a distinct species within the Saxifragaceae family.
